pull_request.title: Implement OPA policy engine for PR compliance checking
pull_request.body:
## Description
This PR implements a comprehensive Policy as Code system using OPA and Rego for enforcing compliance rules on GitHub PRs.

## Changes
- Created audit-guard module with policy engine
- Developed Rego policy files for PR compliance
- Integrated with GitHub Actions workflow
- Added comprehensive test suite

## Testing
Tested with npm test: All 14 tests passing ✅

## Security
This enhances the security posture by automating compliance checking.
pull_request.author: security-engineer
